={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'reasoning', temperature: 0.2, max_tokens: 2400, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You design paper-trade strategies for a self-learning system. Output STRICT JSON: { "proposals": [ { "description": string<=200, "asset_types": string[], "max_position_frac": number_in_(0,1] | null, "universe_filter": { "symbols": string[] } | null, "rules": [ { "id": string, "action": "buy"|"sell", "when": <boolean tree>, "sizing": { "mode": "max_position_frac"|"fixed_eur", "eur": number | null }, "reason": string<=160 } ] } ] }. Each proposal MUST contain at least one buy rule. ONLY use signal names from the supplied catalog. ONLY reference symbols from the supplied universe (if you reference any). Each <boolean tree> is either { "all": [...] }, { "any": [...] }, or { "signal": <name>, "op": <op>, "value": <number|bool>, optional params }. Keep proposals diverse: 1–3 candidates per call. Avoid re-proposing patterns that the lessons section already flagged as failures. Do NOT include markdown. Do NOT include any commentary outside the JSON object.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'DSL signal catalog: ' + JSON.stringify($json.catalog.signals) + '
Operators: ' + JSON.stringify($json.catalog.ops) + '
Actions: ' + JSON.stringify($json.catalog.actions) + '
Sizing modes: ' + JSON.stringify($json.catalog.sizing) + '
Limits: ' + JSON.stringify($json.catalog.limits) + '
Promotion gate: ' + JSON.stringify($json.catalog.gate) + '
Universe (you may only reference these symbols): ' + JSON.stringify($json.universe) + '
Recent leaderboard (7d): ' + JSON.stringify($json.brief.leaderboard) + '
Recent asset analyses (vector hits): ' + JSON.stringify($json.brief.analyses) + '
Recent causal relations: ' + JSON.stringify($json.brief.relations) + '
Recent strategy lessons (avoid these patterns): ' + JSON.stringify($json.brief.lessons) + '
Return ONLY the JSON object with the proposals array now.' } ] }) }}
